creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 229255
net-im/py-matrix-synapse: Update to 1.46.0

The attached patch updates net-im/py-matrix-synapse to 1.46.0. The release is the usual mix of features and bug fixes, but doesn't contain any breaking changes for our users. From a ports perspective, this is also just a simple version bump.

portlint: "OK" (3 Warnings, none new)
testport: OK (poudriere: 130amd64)
do-test: OK (Ran 1989 tests in 978.545s, PASSED (skips=36, successes=1953))

I've tested the resulting package on my production server for the past 24h without any problems whatsoever. Feedback from another user has also been positive, so I think this should be good to go. :)

Cheers,
Sascha

P.S.: Bug #259567 still affects synapse for everyone using latest packages, but since we have a fix for that bug I didn't include the workaround for synapse's version checks in this port.
